productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Solid Beige Socks
description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these light brown socks with the diamond design detail from Reid and Taylor. Made of cotton and lycra blend fabric, these socks can be worn both for work and casual outings. Made of cotton and lycra blend for all-day comfort, stretch and absorption of sweatDiamond design in shades of black and brick red on either side of the sock cuffsRib knit cuff with roomy toe area for superior comfort and durabilitySock careMachine wash cold in 40 degree water using mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not use softenersDo not iron, dry clean or tumble dryDry in shade
